title: doronicum carpetanum
intro: Doronicum carpetanum, also known as golden hawk's beard, is a flowering plant species in the sunflower family native to the Iberian Peninsula and parts of southwestern Europe. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and expectorant properties. The health benefits of Doronicum carpetanum include relief from respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs, as well as its potential to soothe digestive problems and reduce fever. In herbal preparations, the plant's flowers and leaves are typically used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety in various applications.
